response.justification: Szabo is a seasoned principal engineer with 18+ years of experience and demonstrated technical leadership at scale, including roles handling millions of requests per second. However, the resume contains no evidence of experimentation platform experience, A/B testing infrastructure, metrics/telemetry design, or growth engineering—all core to this principal-level role. He appears to be a strong generalist platform engineer whose background is broader than the specific growth/experimentation specialization required.
strengths: 18+ years of progressive technical experience including staff/principal roles with proven ability to ship systems at scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby, millions of annual transactions at Optilyz)
Recent work with AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks demonstrates engagement with cutting-edge developer tooling, aligning with the AI-first direction of the role
Strong technical leadership and mentoring track record, including organizing refactoring dojos, creating workshops, and speaking at conferences (FOSS4G 2019)
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or working on experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or rollout automation—the core focus of this principal role
Resume contains no evidence of metrics instrumentation, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, experimental design, or bias detection expertise required for growth systems

Background is as a full-stack generalist across web, mobile, embedded, and GIS rather than a growth/experimentation specialist; would require significant domain ramp-up despite strong engineering fundamentals

key_factors.factor: Lack of experimentation platform and growth systems experience
Strong general software engineering and technical leadership at scale
Some adjacent experience (optimization, data integration, platform building)
